problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
hypothesis: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Neuromorphic. Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity directly addresses this.
